hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".stop_hook_active")" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo "Running final verification..." >&2; npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5 >&2; BUILD_EXIT=$?; if [ $BUILD_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "BUILD FAILED — fix errors before finishing" >&2; exit 2; fi; npm run lint 2>&1 | tail -5 >&2; LINT_EXIT=$?; if [ $LINT_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo "LINT FAILED — fix lint errors before finishing" >&2; exit 2; fi; echo "All checks passed" >&2; exit 0'
